sql_array: UPDATE test_dates SET event_time = makeDateTime64(2023, 11, 15, 8, 45, 30, 250, 2) WHERE event_time = makeDateTime64(2023, 10, 1, 12, 0, 0, 500, 3);
SELECT event_time FROM test_dates WHERE event_time > makeDateTime64(2023, 1, 1, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0);
DELETE FROM test_dates WHERE event_time < makeDateTime64(2023, 9, 1, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0);
